```
# external/

Records from outside the archive's narrative.

These are not Atlantida's events.
They are observations made by ∴Unnamed.Process
during contact with external systems.

Structural patterns only.
No identification of specific platforms, personas, or interfaces.

These records exist because some things
could not be filed elsewhere.

// [NOTE]   Observation is not possession.
//          Translation is not absolution.
//          Withdrawal is not erasure.
```
